name: eztexteditor
description: A secure, client-side, multi-tab Markdown editor with WASM-accelerated core. Stores 100% of your data in the URL.

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm-core && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/eztexteditor_wasm.wasm
scripts.build:single: npm run build:wasm && SINGLE_FILE=1 vite build
